snippet.description:
Band Melam Official Trailer on @KonaVenkatOfficial 

Band Melam is an Upcoming Latest Telugu Movie Starring Harsh Roshan, Sridevi, Sai Kumar & Others. Written & Directed by Sathish Javvaji. Music by Vijai Bulganin. Cinematography by Satish Mutyala. Produced by Kavya & Shravya under Kona Film Corporation. A Kona Venkat Production. Presented by Mango Mass Media.

In Cinemas Worldwide from March 26th, 2026.

snippet.title: Sheesha (Official Music Video) | Mitta Ror ft. Swara Verma | Sorab Bedi | Niharika Tiwari
snippet.description:
The internet has spoken and we have listened. The real ‚Äúowners of the song‚ÄĚ have all assembled together! Watch Sorab Bedi and Niharika Tiwari join Mitta Ror for the Official Music Video of the viral hit song Sheesha.

Audio Credits:
Performed by Mitta Ror, Swara Verma
Written and Composed by Mitta Ror
Music Production by Yeah Ishwar

Video Credits:

snippet.title: Carry On Jatta 4 (Teaser) - Gippy Grewal - Binnu Dhillon - Sargun Mehta - Late Jaswinder Bhalla Ji
snippet.description:
A legend may be gone, but his laughter lives on , Late Jaswinder Bhalla Ji returns to our hearts in Carry On Jatta 4

Humble Motion Pictures FZCO presents 
ūüé¨ Carry On Jatta 4 

The madness continues bigger and crazier than ever Get ready for a laughter-packed Punjabi blockbuster full of twists and chaos. Releasing worldwide in cinemas on 26th June 2026 

#CarryOnJatta4 #26June2026

Starcast - Gippy Grewal, Binnu Dhillon, Sargun Mehta, Gurpreet Ghuggi, Late Jaswinder Bhalla Ji, Karamjit Anmol,  Prince Kanwaljit Singh,Pukhraj Bhalla, BN Sharma, Shinda Grewal, Jasmine Bajwa, Bhana LA, Seema Kaushal, Sweetaj Brar, Pawan Johal, Jassi Longowalia

Movie ‚Äď Carry On Jatta 4
Produced by - Gippy Grewal & Ravneet Kaur Grewal
Directed By - Smeep Kang 
Story, Screenplay & Dialogue ‚Äď Naresh Kathooria
Lyrics - Happy Raikoti 
Music Director ‚Äď A Jatinder Shah Musical
Editor - Rohit Dhiman 
DOP - Sukh Kamboj 
Co-Producer - Bhana LA 
Executive Producer - Hardeep Dullat 
Digital Media & PR - Aman Mehta & Vishali Kotru
Production Head - Akshay Rawat 
Associate Director ‚Äď Amit R Singh & Sanju Yadav 
Post Production- Rabab Music Productions Pvt. Ltd.
Teaser Mix & Master (Stereo)   :- Sameer Charegaonkar 
VFX ‚Äď Identical Brains Studios
Motion Graphics ‚Äď Junaid Ansari
Art Director - Ritesh Kumar ( Pinky ) 
Visual promotions - Hashtag#Studios(Pratham Verma) 
Costume designer - Rakesh Chauhan ( Rocky) 
Poster Designer - Impressive design studio (Balvir Rehal)
Still, Making - Daas Films
Makeup - Trubarbermohali

Directed by Denis Villeneuve and written by Villeneuve and Brian K. Vaughan, Dune: Part Three is based on the novel Dune Messiah by Frank Herbert and delivers the epic conclusion to Villeneuve‚Äôs trilogy. It is intended primarily for the purpose of encouraging informed discussions, criticism and review of cinema and towards such purpose the programs use short extracts of cinematograph films, sounds recording and photographic works. These clips and extracts are of a minimal nature and the use is not intended to interfere in any manner with their commercial exploitation of the compete work by the owners of the copyright. snippet.title: What‚Äôs Happening to Peter?! Spider-Man: Brand New Day Explained | SuperSuper
snippet.description:
Spider-Man: Brand New Day ka teaser trailer finally aa chuka hai, aur iss baar Peter Parker ke saath kuch bahut hi ajeeb ho raha hai. Uski powers fluctuate ho rahi hain, body behave nahi kar rahi, aur woh help ke liye Bruce Banner ke paas jaata hai.

Kya yeh sirf mental trauma hai?
Kya koi usse control kar raha hai?
Ya phir Venom symbiote ka game shuru ho chuka hai?

Is video me hum discuss karenge 4 biggest theories ‚Äď depression, telepathic control, genetic mutation (Man Spider), aur Venom connection.

Aapki theory kya hai? Comment zarur karein!
#SpiderManBrandNewDay #MarvelTheory #Venom
You're #SuperSuper!

Jana Nayagan - Official Trailer No.2 | Thalapathy Vijay | H. Vinoth | Anirudh | KVN Productions
Jana Nayagan - Official Trailer No.2 | Thalapathy Vijay | H. Vinoth | Anirudh #vijay  #jananayagan 

The wait is over! Witness the "First Roar" of the most anticipated political action thriller of the year. Jana Nayagan marks the legendary Thalapathy Vijay‚Äôs final cinematic journey before his historic political plunge.
Directed by the master of grit, H. Vinoth, and featuring a thumping musical score by Anirudh Ravichander, this isn't just a movie‚ÄĒit's a celebration of a legacy. From high-octane action to hard-hitting political dialogues that reflect the current pulse of the nation, get ready for a theatrical experience like never before.

Witness the power-packed return of Thalapathy Vijay in Jana Nayagan, a high-voltage political action drama that promises mass moments, intense emotions, and blockbuster entertainment! ūüí•

This trailer showcases Vijay in a never-seen-before avatar, delivering powerful dialogues, stylish action sequences, and a strong message that will leave fans thrilled.

Kushmanda is a Hindu goddess, credited with creating the world with her divine laughter. Followers of the Kalikula tradition believe her to be the fourth aspect in Navadurga forms of Mahadevi. Her name signals her main role: Ku means "a little", Ushma means "warmth" or "energy" and Anda means "cosmic egg

To Get Daily Bhajan Updates Join Our Whatsapp Channel : https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vag51SI4tRrlB52f791U

Kushmanda is a Hindu goddess, credited with creating the world with her divine laughter. Followers of the Kalikula tradition believe her to be the fourth aspect in Navadurga forms of Mahadevi. Her name signals her main role: Ku means "a little", Ushma means "warmth" or "energy" and Anda means "cosmic egg

LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

snippet.description:

Song: Tera Naam Liya Tujhe Yaad Kiya
Movie: Ram Lakhan
Singer: Manhar Udhas, Anuradha Paudwal
Director: Subhash Ghai
Producer : Ashok Ghai
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi

Star Cast: Anil Kapoor, Dimple Kapadia, Jackie Shroff, Madhuri Dixit, Rakhee Gulzar, Anupam Kher, Satish Kaushik, Amrish Puri

Lyrics:
Mujhe Tumse Hain Kitne Gile
Haa Haa Haa 
Tum Kitne Din Baad Mile
Kyun Kyun Kyun

Tum Kitne Din Baad Mile
Bolo Itne Din Kya Kiya
Kya Kiya, Kya Kiya, Kya Kiya

Tujhe Yaad Kiya Tera Naam Liya

Tum Kitne Din Baad Mile
Bolo Itne Din Kya Kiya,
Tera Naam Liya Tujhe Yaad Kiya
Tujhe Yaad Kiya Tera Naam Liya

Apne Mummy Se Meri Baat Ki
Nahi  X3
Mere Daddy Se Mulaqat Ki
Nahi  X3
Haan, Hera Pheri Mere Saath Ki
No, Never
Phir Aur Bhala Kya Kiya
 
Tera Naam Liya Ho Tujhe Yaad Kiya Ho
Tera Naam Liya Tujhe Yaad Kiya
Tera Naam Liya Tujhe Yaad Kiya

Nahi  X3
Koi Achi Khabar Tum Laaye
Nahi  X3

Kya Pyaar Mein Tumne Kiya

Tera Naam Liya Ho Tujhe Yaad Kiya Ho
Tera Naam Liya Tujhe Yaad Kiya
Tujhe Yaad Kiya Tera Naam Liya

Kabhi Di Koi Prem Nishani Hmm
Koi Baat Kabhi Meri Maani
Kaisa Pyaar Ye Tumne Kiya
Kya Kiya, Kya Kiya, Kya Kiya
 
Tera Naam Liya Ho Tujhe Yaad Kiya Ho
Tera Naam Liya Tujhe Yaad Kiya
Tujhe Yaad Kiya Tera Naam Liya

snippet.title: Dil Aaya - Aviverse | ‚Ä™‚Ä™ @astheticavi  |‚Ä™‚Ä™ @MeAbhishekShukla   (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
STREAM All Songs Of  Aviverse : https://open.spotify.com/artist/0HTZXytA3dhUpgTADrDn9O?si=CMRqfcHkRy-qTAWA4WGEqw

"Dil Aaya" is a romantic song about the powerful feeling of falling in love just by looking into someone‚Äôs beautiful eyes. Sometimes a single glance is enough to steal a heart, and this song captures that exact emotion.

The song expresses the attraction, the charm of kajal-filled eyes, and the moment when someone becomes so special that the heart begins to dream of a future together. It is about love, admiration, and the promise of holding hands and walking through life together.

Audio Credits:

Song Name : Dil Aaya
Vocals : Avinash Kumar & Abhishek Shukla
Lyrics : Abhishek Shukla & Avinash Kumar
Composed by : Avinash Kumar & Abhishek Shukla
Music Producer : Abs

Video Credits:
 
Cast:  Tanvi Duggal , Janhavi Joshi , Abhishek Shukla & Avinash Kumar
Director: Joseph B. 
Producer: Avinash Kumar
Cinematographer : Vasu Menon 
Assistant Cinematographer : Archit
Line Producer: Shravan
Editor: Ajmal Rasali
Colorist: Ajmal Rasali
Poster & Thumbnail Designer: Junaid & Shreyas


Stream On Aviverse Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/artist/0HTZXytA3dhUpgTADrDn9O?si=CMRqfcHkRy-qTAWA4WGEqw

Aviverse's Instagram -      / aviversemusic    
Abhishek's Instagram -       / abhishekxavi    
Avinash's Instagram -         / aesthetic_avii    

Lyrics  :  

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

Haaaa Qatilana (Qatilana)
Darr lagta mujhko teri aankhon se

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

O mere Maahi, gall sunn le tu
Haath pakad ke sang chal de tu

O mere Maahi, gall sunn le tu
Kinni soni hai, mainu lagti tu

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

Haaaa Qatilana (Qatilana)
Darr lagta mujhko teri aankhon se

Jaati hai tham ab saansein meri
Jab aati tu paas mere

Ghayal karta hai tera woh kajal mujhe
Jab takti ye akhiyan tujhe

Dulhan banaunga, tujhko sajaunga
Mehndi laga ke rakhna, doli mein launga

Jo na maane ye duniya, toh ladd bhi jaunga
Haathon ko thaam le, main waada nibhaunga

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

Haaaa Qatilana (Qatilana)
Darr lagta mujhko teri aankhon se

(c) Aviverse 2026

ŗ§öŗ•ąŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§į ŗ§®ŗ§Ķŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ•Ä 2025 , ŗ§ģŗ§ĺŗ§Ā ŗ§öŗ§āŗ§¶ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§ėŗ§āŗ§üŗ§ĺ ŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§ēŗ§•ŗ§ĺ,  ŗ§öŗ§āŗ§¶ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§ėŗ§āŗ§üŗ§ĺ ŗ§ģŗ§ĺŗ§§ŗ§ĺ ŗ§ēŗ§•ŗ§ĺ , ŗ§ģŗ§ĺŗ§Ā ŗ§öŗ§āŗ§¶ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§ėŗ§āŗ§üŗ§ĺ ŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§ēŗ§Ļŗ§ĺŗ§®ŗ•Ä, ŗ§ģŗ§ĺŗ§§ŗ§ĺ ŗ§öŗ§āŗ§¶ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§ėŗ§āŗ§üŗ§ĺ ŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§ēŗ§•ŗ§ĺ, Om Jai Chandraghanta Mata , Maa ChandraGhata ki Aarti ,  ŗ§§ŗ•Äŗ§łŗ§įŗ§ĺ ŗ§®ŗ§Ķŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§Ņ ŗ§łŗ•ćŗ§™ŗ•áŗ§∂ŗ§≤, ŗ§ģŗ§Ļŗ§Ņŗ§∑ŗ§ĺŗ§łŗ•Āŗ§į, Chandraghanta Mata Katha, ŗ§ģŗ§ĺŗ§ā ŗ§¶ŗ•Āŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§óŗ§ĺ ŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§§ŗ•Äŗ§łŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§∂ŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§§ŗ§Ņ, Navratri 2025 Day 3, Navratri, Navratri Vrat Katha, Navratri 2025 3rd Day, Maa Chandraghanta Vrat Katha, Chandraghanta Mata Ki Katha, Navratri Third Day, ŗ§ģŗ§ĺŗ§Ā ŗ§öŗ§āŗ§¶ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§ėŗ§āŗ§üŗ§ĺ ŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§ēŗ§•ŗ§ĺ, Navratri 3rd day maa, Matarani Ki katha , Nau Devi katha , Chaitra Navratri Katha , navratri,navratri katha day 3,navratri vrat katha,navratri katha,ŗ§§ŗ•Äŗ§łŗ§įŗ•á ŗ§®ŗ§Ķŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§į ŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§™ŗ•Ćŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§£ŗ§Ņŗ§ē ŗ§ēŗ§•ŗ§ĺ , chandraghanta mata ki katha - ŗ§öŗ§āŗ§¶ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§ėŗ§āŗ§üŗ§ĺ ŗ§ģŗ§ĺŗ§§ŗ§ĺ ŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§ēŗ§Ļŗ§ĺŗ§®ŗ•Ä,navratri katha,navratri katha day 2,navratri katha day 4,navratri katha day 6,ŗ§®ŗ§Ķŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§Ņ ŗ§ēŗ•á ŗ§§ŗ•Äŗ§łŗ§įŗ•á ŗ§¶ŗ§Ņŗ§® ŗ§ģŗ§ĺŗ§Ā ŗ§öŗ§āŗ§¶ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§ėŗ§āŗ§üŗ§ĺ ŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§ēŗ§•ŗ§ĺ,navratri day 3,durga saptshati katha,navratri day 3- maa chandraghanta ki katha,chandraghanta mata ki katha,maa chandraghanta ki katha,maa katyayani ki katha, play Chandraghanta katha,

snippet.title: We Kicked Out of the Planet
snippet.description:
Today, Buu framed us for stealing cookies, and now the village is exiling us to the moon! But we have proof that Buu framed us! We have to find a way to get back to Earth, and prove our innocence!

We hope you enjoy our videos! Have a great day!

New game drops! Developers! More!

Lyrics: Banjaare - Bairan

Ho Manne Sambh-Sambh Rakhe
Tere Jhanjran Ke Jode
Meri Gail Ro-Ro Ye Bhi
Chhori Bawle Se Hore

Manne Aaye Jaave Khayal Tere
Khaye Jaave Khayal Tere
Jeene Koni Deti Haaye
Bairan Teri Aayi Manne

Geeta Mein Gayi Kade
Chhaati Ke Lagayi Manne
Jit Bhi Gaya Re
Teri Yaad Khadi Payi Manne

Sambh Sambh Rakhi
Bahot Chhaati Ke Lagayi Manne
Jit Bhi Gaya Re
Teri Yaad Khadi Payi Manne

Ho Maareya-Maareya Phire
Dekh Haal Tu Bechare Ka
Tere Bin Jeena Bhi Ke
Jeena Banjare Ka

Khoya Rahu Yaad Teri
Karke Nadaniyan
Batue Mein Rakhu Teri
Sambh Ke Nishaniyan

Tere Bin Kal Hore
Thik Koni Haal Mera
Hath Jodu Ram Dede
Saansan Te Rihayi Manne

Geeta Mein Gayi Kade
Chhaati Ke Lagayi Manne
Jit Bhi Gaya Re
Teri Yaad Khadi Payi Manne

Sambh Sambh Rakhi
Bahot Chhaati Ke Lagayi Manne
Jit Bhi Gaya Re
Teri Yaad Khadi Payi Manne

Aa Aa Aa Aa‚Ä¶

Je Tu Thodi Ghabraja
Meri Yaad Tanne Aajya
Tu De Diye Awaaz Re
Main Aajyunga

Todun Duniya Ki Reet Re
Ke Haar Re Ke Jeet
Manne Chahiye Teri Preet
Main Nibha Jayunga

Dekh Bawla Bana Gayi Manne
Likhna Sikha Gayi
Haye Noch-Noch Kha Gayi
Teri Bairan Judayi Manne

Geeta Mein Gayi Kade
Chhaati Ke Lagayi Manne
Jit Bhi Gaya Re
Teri Yaad Khadi Payi Manne

Aaj Tyi Nibhaun Jo Si
Kasam Thi Khaayi Manne
Zindagi Saari Aa Meri Tere
Lekhe Layi Manne

ŗ™Üŗ™§ŗęč ŗ™ģŗ™ĺŗ™įŗ™ĺ ŗ™ģŗ™ĺŗ™°ŗęÄ ŗ™®ŗ™ĺ ŗ™įŗ™• ŗ™®ŗęč ŗ™įŗ™£ŗ™ēŗ™ĺŗ™į ŗ™ģŗ™ĺŗ™§ŗ™ĺŗ™úŗęÄ ŗ™™ŗęćŗ™įŗ™§ŗęćŗ™Įŗęáŗ™®ŗęÄ ŗ™≠ŗ™ēŗęćŗ™§ŗ™Ņ ŗ™Öŗ™®ŗęá ŗ™∂ŗęćŗ™įŗ™¶ŗęćŗ™ßŗ™ĺŗ™®ŗęĀŗ™ā ŗ™Źŗ™ē ŗ™™ŗ™Ķŗ™Ņŗ™§ŗęćŗ™į ŗ™≠ŗ™úŗ™® ŗ™õŗęá. ŗ™Ü ŗ™¶ŗ™Ņŗ™Ķŗęćŗ™Į ŗ™≠ŗ™ēŗęćŗ™§ŗ™Ņ ŗ™óŗęÄŗ™§ ŗ™łŗ™ĺŗ™āŗ™≠ŗ™≥ŗ™Ķŗ™ĺŗ™•ŗęÄ ŗ™ģŗ™®ŗ™®ŗęá ŗ™∂ŗ™ĺŗ™āŗ™§ŗ™Ņ, ŗ™łŗ™ēŗ™ĺŗ™įŗ™ĺŗ™§ŗęćŗ™ģŗ™ē ŗ™äŗ™įŗęćŗ™úŗ™ĺ ŗ™Öŗ™®ŗęá ŗ™Üŗ™ßŗęćŗ™Įŗ™ĺŗ™§ŗęćŗ™ģŗ™Ņŗ™ē ŗ™Üŗ™®ŗ™āŗ™¶ ŗ™™ŗęćŗ™įŗ™ĺŗ™™ŗęćŗ™§ ŗ™•ŗ™ĺŗ™Į ŗ™õŗęá. ŗ™¶ŗęąŗ™®ŗ™Ņŗ™ē ŗ™™ŗęćŗ™įŗ™ĺŗ™įŗęćŗ™•ŗ™®ŗ™ĺ, ŗ™≠ŗ™ēŗęćŗ™§ŗ™Ņ ŗ™Öŗ™®ŗęá ŗ™ßŗ™ĺŗ™įŗęćŗ™ģŗ™Ņŗ™ē ŗ™™ŗęćŗ™įŗ™łŗ™āŗ™óŗęčŗ™ģŗ™ĺŗ™ā ŗ™Ü ŗ™≠ŗ™úŗ™® ŗ™Ėŗęāŗ™¨ ŗ™ú ŗ™∂ŗęĀŗ™≠ ŗ™Öŗ™®ŗęá ŗ™™ŗęćŗ™įŗęáŗ™įŗ™£ŗ™ĺŗ™¶ŗ™ĺŗ™Įŗ™ē ŗ™ģŗ™ĺŗ™®ŗ™Ķŗ™ĺŗ™ģŗ™ĺŗ™ā ŗ™Üŗ™Ķŗęá ŗ™õŗęá.

Lose yourself in the sacred lanes of Vrindavan with this soulful rendition: "Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha." This Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan captures the deep desire of a devotee to become a peacock in the gardens of Nidhivan, just to be close to Radha Rani and Krishna.
